Our SaaS pricing model has three tiers: Starter at twenty dollars per month, Professional at fifty dollars per month, and Enterprise with custom annual billing. Monthly subscribers can switch to annual plans for a fifteen percent discount. Enterprise customers get volume discounts based on seat count, with invoicing handled through our billing portal. We recently adjusted the Professional tier to include priority support, which reduced churn by twelve percent. The pricing committee meets quarterly to review competitive positioning and decide whether to introduce a mid-tier option between Starter and Professional. All subscription changes take effect at the next billing cycle, and we offer a thirty-day money-back guarantee for new customers evaluating the platform.
